items.title: JUST IN: The New York Knicks and Jordan Clarkson have agreed to a one-year, $3.9 million deal, league sources told HoopsHype. Klutch Sports CEO Rich Paul and agent Brandon Cavanaugh worked with the Knicks to keep Clarkson in New York.
